message:
feat(pages/verify): Add unencrypted archive support and security hardening

Extend the pages verification module to handle both encrypted and
unencrypted archive configurations:

1. Unencrypted archive support in check_size_limits():
   - Parse config.json to determine archive type (ArchiveConfig enum)
   - For encrypted: validate payload/*.bin chunks as before
   - For unencrypted: validate the single payload file path from config

2. Security hardening for payload file paths:
   - Reject absolute paths in payload.files[] entries
   - Reject parent directory traversal components (..)
   - Require all payload files reside under payload/ directory
   - Add zero chunk_size validation (prevents division by zero)

These changes enable the pages verification system to correctly handle
sites deployed without encryption while adding defense-in-depth checks
against path traversal attacks in the payload manifest.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
